noticias.titulo: Eurizon Capital SGR S.p.A. Acquires Shares of 736,872 Itau Unibanco Holding S.A. $ITUB
noticias.resumo: Eurizon Capital SGR S.p.A. has acquired 736,872 shares of Itau Unibanco Holding S.A. (NYSE:ITUB) worth approximately $5.28 million during the fourth quarter. This acquisition comes as Itau Unibanco missed its Q4 earnings and revenue estimates, reporting EPS of $0.20 against an expected $0.22, and revenue of $9.01 billion versus an anticipated $9.41 billion. Despite the misses, analysts currently rate the stock a "Moderate Buy" with an average target price of $9.00, and the company recently declared a special dividend of $0.068 per share.

noticias.titulo: Itaú Unibanco Board Approves Interest on Capital Distribution on May 28, 2026
noticias.resumo: Itaú Unibanco's board of directors approved the distribution of interest on capital to shareholders, to be paid by August 31, 2026. This distribution will amount to R$0.36188 per share gross, or R$0.298551 net, with the credit recorded on June 29, 2026, for shareholders of record as of June 18, 2026. Analysts currently rate ITUB as a Buy with a $9.00 price target, supported by solid financials and an attractive valuation, despite some technical and financial risks.

noticias.titulo: Itaú Unibanco Formalizes Executive Removal in May 28 Board Meeting
noticias.resumo: Itaú Unibanco (ITUB) formalized the removal of executive Luís Eduardo Gross Siqueira Cunha, effective March 31, 2026, during a May 28, 2026 board meeting. The decision was reported in a Form 6-K filing with the U.S. SEC, indicating a change in the bank's executive lineup. Analysts maintain a "Buy" rating on ITUB with a $9.00 price target, while TipRanks' AI analyst, Spark, rates it as "Neutral" due to financial performance and earnings outlook balanced against technical momentum and financial risks.

noticias.titulo: Itaú Unibanco Approves BRL 3.99 Billion Interest on Capital for 2026
noticias.resumo: Itaú Unibanco's board has approved a BRL 3.99 billion Interest on Capital payment for fiscal year 2026, amounting to BRL 0.36188 per share (BRL 0.298551 net) payable by August 31, 2026, to shareholders of record on June 18, 2026. This decision underscores the bank's commitment to shareholder remuneration. Analysts currently rate ITUB stock as a Buy with a $9.00 price target, while TipRanks’ AI Analyst, Spark, assigns a Neutral score, citing solid financial performance and attractive valuation offset by weak near-term technical momentum and financial risks.

noticias.titulo: Itaú Unibanco Formalizes Executive Removal in May 28 Board Meeting
noticias.resumo: Itaú Unibanco Holding S.A. has filed a Form 6-K with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission, informing U.S. investors about a recent governance action. The filing confirms the unanimous decision by the board of directors to formalize the removal of officer Luís Eduardo Gross Siqueira Cunha, effective retroactively from March 31, 2026. This change in executive lineup is noted not to alter the bank's disclosed strategic direction at this stage.

noticias.titulo: Itaú Unibanco Q1 2026 slides: profit rises 10% YoY, ROE holds at 25%
noticias.resumo: Itaú Unibanco reported strong Q1 2026 results with a recurring managerial profit of R$12.3 billion, a 10.4% increase year-over-year, and a robust return on equity (ROE) of 24.8%. The bank saw its credit portfolio expand by 9.0% annually and maintained stable credit quality metrics. Despite a previous quarter's miss, Itaú reaffirmed its full-year 2026 guidance, demonstrating confidence in its financial outlook amidst Brazil's challenging economic environment.

noticias.titulo: Itau Unibanco (ITUB) director receives 48,460 preferred shares in equity award
noticias.resumo: Marino Ricardo Villela, a director at Itau Unibanco Holding S.A. (ITUB), received an equity award of 48,460 preferred shares (ITUB4) on May 8, 2026, at no cost. This transaction, reported via a Form 4 filing, is a grant and not an open-market purchase. After this award, his direct preferred share holdings increased to 248,758, and he also holds substantial indirect preferred and common shares, though he disclaims beneficial ownership for some of these except for his pecuniary interest.

Following this transaction, he directly holds 51,503 preferred shares. This information was reported in a Form 4 filing, indicating an acquisition rather than an open-market purchase.

noticias.titulo: Itaú Unibanco (NYSE: ITUB) earns R$11.9B net income in Q1 2026
noticias.resumo: Itaú Unibanco Holding S.A. reported a net income of R$11.9 billion for Q1 2026, marking a 10.9% increase year-over-year, with a recurring return on average equity of 22.9%. Despite an 8.0% decline in net interest income, primarily due to lower results from repurchase agreements and foreign exchange, the bank's credit portfolio expanded to R$1.5 trillion, and expected credit loss from financial assets decreased by 5.8%. The bank also approved R$3.85 billion in interest on capital for shareholders and maintained a comfortable Tier 1 capital ratio of 13.4%.

noticias.titulo: Itaú Unibanco Holding S.A. stock (BRITUBACNPR7): Shares ease after cautious outlook on Brazilian banking margins
noticias.resumo: Itaú Unibanco Holding S.A. shares have recently slipped due to investor caution regarding Brazilian banking margins and a broader macroeconomic backdrop, with the stock trading in the low $8s on the NYSE. Despite this short-term pressure, Itaú Unibanco remains a major and diversified player in Brazil's financial sector, offering a range of services including lending, payments, insurance, and wealth management. Its performance will continue to be influenced by domestic interest rates, credit quality, and regulatory changes, making it an avenue for US investors seeking exposure to Brazil's banking system.

noticias.titulo: Itaú Unibanco Shifts Material Disclosures to New News Portal
noticias.resumo: Itaú Unibanco Holding S.A. has announced a change in its online news portal for disclosing material acts and facts to the market, moving these communications to a freely accessible section of the MZ Group website. This operational adjustment, effective May 8, 2026, aims to maintain regulatory compliance and ensure consistent access to information for investors and stakeholders. The bank also resubmitted its Registration Form and Disclosure Policy to reflect the new channel, underscoring its commitment to timely and organized communication.

noticias.titulo: Itaú Unibanco Updates Global Policy on Disclosure of Material Information
noticias.resumo: Itaú Unibanco has updated its global Policy for the Disclosure of Material Acts or Facts to align with Brazil’s CVM Resolution No. 44. This revised policy aims to strengthen governance and investor confidence by defining material information, mandating timely disclosure, and setting clear responsibilities for its Investor Relations Officer and a Disclosure and Trading Committee. The update includes detailed examples of events that require disclosure, ranging from M&A to significant legal proceedings, reinforcing confidentiality and response procedures.

The bank's capital of R$230.5 billion supports R$1.56 trillion in risk-weighted assets, reflecting disciplined capital management. Analysts maintain a Buy rating on ITUB stock with a $9.00 price target, and TipRanks' AI Analyst issues an "Outperform" rating due to solid financial performance despite leverage and cash-flow volatility.

noticias.titulo: Itaú Unibanco Holding S.A. stock (BRITUBACNPR7): Q1 profit up on higher recurring earnings and net
noticias.resumo: Itaú Unibanco Holding S.A. reported a strong first quarter in 2026, with recurring managerial results increasing by 10.4% year-on-year to R$12.3 billion, driven by higher net interest income and robust loan growth in Brazil. The bank's diversified business model, digital transformation efforts, and dividend-paying profile make it an attractive option for US investors seeking exposure to the Brazilian financial sector, despite inherent risks associated with currency fluctuations and macroeconomic conditions in emerging markets.

noticias.titulo: Strong Q1 2026 capital and liquidity at Itaú Unibanco (NYSE: ITUB)
noticias.resumo: Itaú Unibanco (NYSE: ITUB) reported strong capital and liquidity metrics for Q1 2026, including a Common Equity Tier 1 ratio of 12.0% and a total capital ratio of 14.8%, both well above regulatory minimums. The bank showcased robust liquidity with a Liquidity Coverage Ratio of 195.1% and a Net Stable Funding Ratio of 122.0%, along with a Basel III leverage ratio of 6.5%. The report highlights the bank's comprehensive risk management framework, covering various types of financial risks, and its adherence to international and national regulatory standards.
